title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Queen, Sanji, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Straw Hat Pirates, Unknown person #3 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How...? I could've sworn that blade was going for his throat!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Was it arrangement Haki? But that wouldn't explain it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I remember judge mentioning something before...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: way to go, Sanji, my boy!!! You broke a sword with your bare neck!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't want to be like them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, where do you think you're going?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I need to figure out what caused this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Let me think for a bit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Am I going to lose my emotions?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhaha, get back here and put on your raid suit!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Show me what Germa Science can do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, you don't look too good.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
